one_time_description: Forgiveness of Treaty Loan by Indigenous Services Canada totaling $3,643,904
economic_notes: Nation holds investments in Nanwakolas Carbon Credit LP, Nanwakolas Offset LP, Nanwakolas Forestry LP, Nanwakolas Timber LP (including Knight Inlet Grizzly Tours Ltd.), and Gwabalis Fisheries LP. Subsequent event: In year ended March 31, 2024, Nation joined BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP and received a $2,983,575 distribution representing five years of gaming revenue allocations.
notes: Auditor issued a disclaimer of opinion due to loss or destruction of accounting records and inadequate record keeping. Management explicitly acknowledged financial statements are inaccurate and incomplete. Forensic audit by Ernst & Young identified approximately $413,597 in potentially unsupported/ineligible ISC payments and $54,646 in personal credit card charges during April 2016 to September 2019. Subsidiary Da'naxda'xw Economic Development Corporation is fully consolidated. Five Government Business Partnerships accounted for under modified equity method. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $357,866 plus due to related parties $514,302 plus deferred revenue $183,132 less long-term portion. ISC treaty loan of $3,643,904 was forgiven during the year, recorded as other income. Financial statements issued October 2025 for the year ended March 31, 2020, indicating significant delay. Prior year figures restated for prior period adjustments related to Nanwakolas Timber LP bonus and under-accrued rental income.
